---
format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: standalone
---

```{mermaid}
stateDiagram-v2
    direction LR

    state "State 0<br>No dependency" as S0
    state "State 1<br>Mild dependency" as S1
    state "State 2<br>Moderate dependency" as S2
    state "State 3<br>Severe dependency" as S3

    S0 --> S1
    S1 --> S2
    S2 --> S3
    S0 --> S2
    S1 --> S3
    S0 --> S3
```
